$comment: Scoped permissions for the unattended headless runs. READ-ONLY by design: the full bird READ toolset is allowed (search/news/list-timeline/user-tweets/home/likes/etc.), while every bird WRITE command (tweet, reply, follow, unfollow, unbookmark) is blocked. Writes are blocked two ways: (a) omitted from the allow-list, so in headless -p they're denied by default; (b) the collision-free ones are also denied explicitly. So these runs physically cannot post or mutate anything on X. File writes are auto-approved via --permission-mode acceptEdits in the wrappers. NOTE: `bird follow`/`bird reply` are intentionally NOT in deny — a naive prefix-deny could also block the read commands `followers`/`following`/`replies`; omission already blocks them safely. Copy this to <PROJECT_ROOT>/.claude/settings.json.
